title: carex serotina f. thalassica
intro: Carex serotina f. thalassica, also known as sea-sedge or salt-sedge, is a subspecies of Carex serotina, a type of sedge plant. It is native to coastal areas and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant actions. The health benefits of Carex serotina f. thalassica include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
